title: Hey Nico, you didn't vibe code your data room but stole it from Papermark
summary: A public accusation on X (Twitter) claims that Nico, a developer, did not 'vibe code' (build via AI-assisted rapid prototyping) their data room product, but instead directly copied code from the open-source project Papermark. The Hacker News discussion (341 points, 142 comments) debates code theft, open-source licensing, and the ethics of AI-generated code.
